name: Bento Grid
description: A responsive bento-box style grid layout with animated items, supporting various sizes and hover effects for showcasing features or content.
whenToUse: Use for feature showcases, dashboard layouts, portfolio grids, or any content that benefits from a modern bento-style grid layout.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the grid container

props.name: children
props.description: BentoGridItem components to render in the grid
